This application is specially designed for Windows 11, groups many registry settings and distribute them from the easy and secure user interface. With TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 you can move the Windows taskbar to the top and resize the taskbar by editing the registry value. item.title: Download Brave Browser 1.89.132
item.description: Brave Browser is a browser based on Chromium, the basic principle is that operation fast and privacy of users. The program can block pop-up windows and other ads, plus it blocked the mechanism for monitoring the online activities of your. Therefore, you can purchase and safely browse the website you are interested in without having to worry about the fact that your activity will be monitored and then you will be shown the necessary advertising or service provider of parties...

item.title: Download MssqlMerge Pro 1.40.0
item.description: MssqlMerge Pro is a powerful tool that allows you to quickly merge two SQL databases, as well as import or export custom tables and data. This app is simple to use and supports side-by-side viewing, for easy comparison. Furthermore, the program supports data differentiation, a process designed to highlight changes in structure. Features of MssqlMerge Pro Open two databases in parallel mode Data consolidation, export and import functions Facilitates data discrimination.
